articles.title: Publication: Summary of Deliberations
articles.expand: 13:30 (ET) A summary of monetary policy deliberations by the Governing Council for the policy decision that was announced two weeks earlier.

articles.title: Interest Rate Announcement
articles.expand: 09:45 (ET) On eight scheduled dates each year, the Bank of Canada announces the setting for the overnight rate target in a press release explaining the factors behind the decision.

articles.title: Release: Market Participants Survey
articles.expand: 10:30 (ET) The Market Participants Survey is conducted quarterly. Bank of Canada staff reach out to a diverse set of participants in financial markets to gather their views on key macroeconomic and financial variables as well as on monetary policy.

articles.title: Interest Rate Announcement and Monetary Policy Report
articles.expand: 09:45 (ET)On eight scheduled dates each year, the Bank of Canada announces the setting for the overnight rate target in a press release explaining the factors behind the decision. Four times a year, Governing Council presents the Monetary Policy Report: the Bank’s base-case projection for inflation ...

articles.title: Los mercados globales de gas enfrentan su mayor crisis desde 2022 por el conflicto en Irán
US, Israel, Iran War Enters Day 2 After Trump Declares Khamenei Dead
articles.expand: As the Israel-Iran war moves into its second day, the story is escalating fast, and markets are already treating it as a week-level event rather than a one-night shock. articles.title: El Oro alcanza los 5.260$ ante el aumento de la tensión entres EE.UU. e Irán
articles.expand: Un informe de inflación muy elevado en los Estados Unidos y el aumento de las tensiones entre este y Irán empujaron el precio del Oro al alza el viernes, superando la cifra de 5.260$, registrando ganancias sólidas de más del 1.20%.

articles.title: Gold hits $5,260 as war jitters, trade tension rattle markets
articles.expand: A red-hot inflation report in the United States and rising tensions between the latter and Iran pushed Gold price higher on Friday, past the $5,260 figure, posting solid gains of over 1.20%.

articles.title: El DXY cae mientras la alta inflación del IPP aviva los temores de estanflación
articles.expand: El DXY cayó alrededor del 0.2% el viernes, retrocediendo a 97.60 después de que un informe del Índice de Precios de Productor (IPP) más caliente de lo esperado amplificara las preocupaciones de que la inflación está demostrando ser más persistente de lo que la Reserva Federal (Fed) desearía, pesando

articles.title: Reino Unido: Vista previa de datos y encuestas – Deutsche Bank
articles.expand: Deutsche Bank describe un calendario de datos del Reino Unido muy activo, esperando un aumento en el Crédito al Consumo Neto, un rebote parcial en las Aprobaciones de Hipotecas a 64.5k, y PMI de Manufactura y Servicios sin cambios en 52.0 y 53.9.

articles.title: AUD: Fuerte crecimiento del crédito pero la perspectiva de política monetaria se mantiene sin cambios – BNY
articles.expand: Bob Savage, Jefe de Estrategia Macro de Mercados de BNY, señala que los agregados financieros de Australia de enero muestran un aumento del 0.5% en el crédito mes a mes y del 7.7% interanual, con el crédito hipotecario y el crédito empresarial acelerándose ambos en términos anuales. El crecimiento d...

articles.title: AUD: Strong credit growth but policy view unchanged – BNY
articles.expand: BNY’s Head of Markets Macro Strategy Bob Savage notes Australia’s January financial aggregates show total credit up 0.5% month-on-month and 7.7% year-on-year, with housing and business credit both accelerating on an annual basis. Broad money growth has also picked up.

articles.title: Decisions taken by the Governing Council of the ECB (in addition to decisions setting interest rates)
EUR/GBP gains amid UK political jitters and dovish BoE bets
articles.expand: The Euro (EUR) ticks higher against the British Pound (GBP) on Friday, with Sterling under broad pressure as renewed political uncertainty in the United Kingdom (UK) dampens investor sentiment.

articles.title: Braddick to take the helm at the UK’s banking watchdog
articles.expand: Katharine Braddick CB appointed as the next Deputy Governor for Prudential Regulation at the Bank of England and Chief Executive of the Prudential Regulation Authority, succeeding Sam Woods when his term ends in June 2026.

articles.title: Swiss KOF barometer strengthens to 104.2, demand outlook improves
articles.expand: Switzerland’s economic outlook brightened in February as the KOF Economic Barometer rose from 103.3 to 104.2, beating expectations of 103.1. The increase resumes the upward trend seen in recent months after a brief dip in January and leaves the gauge comfortably above its medium-term average of 100....

articles.title: Swiss GDP returns to modest 0.1% qoq growth, domestic demand stabilizes Q4
articles.expand: Switzerland’s economy returned to modest growth in Q1, with GDP expanding 0.1% qoq. While slightly below expectations of 0.2%, the reading marks a rebound from the -0.4% contraction recorded in Q3. According to the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs, performance varied across sectors, with domes...

articles.title: Switzerland Q4 GDP +0.1% vs +0.2% q/q expected
articles.expand: Prior -0.5%; revised to -0.4% Swiss economic output bounces back in the final quarter of last year, after a drag in the third quarter. The decline was largely due to a big fall in the chemical and pharmaceutical industry, but that has now rebounded (+1.9%) in Q4 2025. Domestic demand conditions (+0....
